text.title: Rust Tokio Async Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Rust Tokio Async end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: pick-runtime
step.action: Pick multi_thread or current_thread; set worker_threads.

step.name: inventory-blocking
step.action: Identify blocking calls; route via spawn_blocking.
step.decision-gate: Reject inline blocking on async paths.

step.name: wire-channels
step.action: Set bounded mpsc with default_capacity; document overflow policy.

step.name: wire-shutdown
step.action: Listen ctrl_c + propagate via CancellationToken or shutdown mpsc.
